creator: contact@linuxstans.com
text: We'd like to get listed at https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult_bycat/ - we're a team of freelancers offering FreeBSD services. Including, but not limited to installing, setting up, and configuring FreeBSD, as well as 24/7 maintenance, monitoring, and updates. More info: https://linuxstans.com/support/
